data.title: Masonry expert Sean Mulligan explains chimney repair vs. rebuild in HelloNation article on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: In a recent article published on HelloNation, Sean Mulligan of Sean Mulligan Masonry provided insights on determining whether chimney repair is sufficient or if a full chimney rebuild is necessary. The article, dated February 18, 2026, presents valuable recommendations for homeowners facing this decision. For more information on this topic, readers can refer to the HelloNation piece featuring expert advice from Sean Mulligan.

data.title: OpenAI & Paradigm introduce EVMbench to test AI agents' ability in identifying and resolving smart contract vulnerabilities.
data.description: OpenAI and Paradigm have collaborated to unveil EVMbench, a new tool designed to evaluate the proficiency of AI agents in identifying and rectifying smart contract vulnerabilities. This tool aims to assess the competence of AI in addressing such vulnerabilities effectively.

data.title: Oceaneering announces 2025 Q4 & full year financial results.
data.description: In the latest economic update, it was reported that the national unemployment rate dropped to 4.8% in April, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The job market saw the addition of 275,000 new jobs last month, exceeding analysts' expectations. Additionally, the country's GDP grew by 6.5% in the first quarter of this year, showcasing a strong rebound in economic activity. These positive indicators have instilled confidence in consumers and investors, leading to a surge in stock market performance. Experts believe that with the ongoing vaccination efforts and easing of pandemic restrictions, the economy is poised for further growth in the coming months.

data.title: Aptar will join investor conferences, engaging with stakeholders for updates and future plans.
data.description: New data from the government revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.8% in the latest quarter, a slight improvement from the previous 5.2%. The number of employed individuals increased by 150,000, reaching a total of 31.5 million people. Additionally, the labor force participation rate also rose to 62.5%. These figures indicate a positive trend in the job market despite the challenges posed by the ongoing pandemic. It is hoped that this momentum will continue and further boost the economy in the coming months.

data.title: Acadian Timber Corp appoints Malcolm Cockwell as Interim President & CEO, effective immediately. TSX: ADN.
data.description: In Edmundston, New Brunswick, on February 18, 2026, Acadian Timber Corp. disclosed that Malcolm Cockwell has been named as the Interim President & Chief Executive Officer. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as ADN, made this announcement today.

data.title: Ottawa Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.11 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on March 18 2026 to stockholders.
data.description: Ottawa Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of OSB Community Bank based in Ottawa, Illinois, made an announcement on Feb. 18, 2026. The Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per share. Shareholders of record as of March 4, 2026, will receive the payment around March 18, 2026. The company trades on the OTCQX under the ticker symbol OTTW.

data.title: OceanaGold meets 2025 guidance, records $477M cash, zero debt. Projects 12% increase in production for 2026.
data.description: In 2025, production levels, all-in sustaining costs (AISC), and capital expenses met expectations. The company reported a record-breaking financial performance for both the quarter and year, ending with $477 million in cash reserves and zero debt. The 2026 Guidance forecasts a 12% rise in production for the upcoming year.

data.title: NACG to report Q4 2025 financial results on March 11, 2026 after markets close. Conference call on March 12 at 7:00 a.m. MT.
data.description: A Construction company based in Acheson, Alberta, North American Construction Group Ltd. ("NACG") will report its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on March 11, 2026, after markets close. The results will be available on TSX:NOA.TO/NYSE:NOA. A conference call and webcast will follow on March 12, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Mountain Time (9:00 a.m. Eastern Time) to discuss these results.

data.title: Liberty Latin America announces Q4 & FY 2025 results, CEO cites strong commercial momentum.
data.description: In Denver, Colorado, Liberty Latin America Ltd. (NASDAQ: LILA and LILAK, OTC Link: LILAB) released its financial report for the three months (Q4) and full year (FY) ending December 31, 2025. CEO Balan Nair stated, "The fourth quarter marked a successful year for Liberty Latin America." The residential mobile sector saw robust growth with a consistent rise in postpaid mobile subscribers. Key numbers include revenue, operating income, and subscriber base growth, highlighting the company's positive performance throughout the year.

data.title: Cafrino Gaming sees record revenue in 2025 with 64% Q4 growth, accelerating B2B expansion - PRNewswire, 2/18/2026.
data.description: In Costa Mesa, California on February 18, 2026, Cafrino Gaming, a leading B2B and B2C online poker provider operating since 2014, has revealed impressive financial results for 2025. The company has experienced a significant 64% increase in revenue, marking a record-breaking year. Additionally, Cafrino Gaming is moving forward with its B2B expansion efforts to further solidify its position in the market.

data.title: Tenaris (TS) beats Q4 estimated earnings by 11.54%, reports EPS of $0.87 vs $0.78 estimate. Revenue up $150 million from last year.
data.description: Tenaris (NYSE: TS) released its Q4 earnings on February 18, 2026, at 4:30 PM. They surpassed estimated earnings by 11.54%, with an EPS of $0.87 compared to the expected $0.78. Revenue increased by $150.00 million from the previous year. In terms of previous earnings, the company had also exceeded EPS expectations... Reference full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: eBay exceeds Q4 revenue estimates, reports $2.97 billion revenue, $1.41 Adjusted EPS. Agrees to acquire Depop. Stock surges.
data.description: eBay Inc (NASDAQ: EBAY) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations and offering strong guidance. Q4 revenue reached $2.97 billion, exceeding estimates of $2.89 billion, while Q4 Adjusted EPS stood at $1.41, surpassing estimates of $1.35. Total revenue rose by 15% year-over-year, with gross merchandise volume increasing by 10% to $21.2 billion. The company reported generating $595 million in operating cash flow and $478 million in free cash flow from continuing operations in the quarter. As of December 31, 2025, eBay held $4.8 billion in total cash, cash equivalents, and non-equity investments. eBay stock is witnessing notable strength in the market following these impressive results. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kantata earns #32 spot on G2's 2026 Best Software Awards for Project Management Products, 7th consecutive year in top 50.
data.description: In a joint announcement from London and Irvine, California, Kantata, a prominent global provider of Professional Services Automation (PSA) solutions, revealed their inclusion in G2’s 2026 Best Software Awards. Securing the 32nd spot on the Project Management Products list for this year further solidifies Kantata's position in the industry. This achievement signifies Kantata's consistent performance, as this marks the seventh consecutive year the company has been listed among the top 50 Project Management Products. This recognition is significant as the market is typically saturated with generic work management tools, demonstrating Kantata's enduring impact. Being recognized in these awards underscores their reputation as one of the leading and most reliable providers in the sector.
